videos.headline: NC State beats Florida State in wire-to-wire upset
videos.description: North Carolina State picks up its first road victory over a ranked team since 2008 by defeating No. 12 Florida State 27-21.

videos.headline: Samuels takes early lead over FSU
videos.description: Jaylen Samuels punches it in for NC State to take a 10-0 lead.

videos.headline: Blackman threads the needle for first FSU TD
videos.description: Auden Tate pulls down the TD grab from James Blackman to get FSU on the board.

videos.headline: Campbell goes for 60 yards to set up FSU FG
videos.description: James Blackman connects with George Campbell for 60 yards that leads to a field goal.

videos.headline: Samuels gets shovel pass from Finley for TD
videos.description: Ryan Finley finds Jaylen Samuels with a wonderful shovel pass to put NC State up two scores.

videos.headline: NC State player spits on Florida State logo
videos.description: Bradley Chubb punctuates NC State's upset win over Florida State by spitting on the midfield Seminoles logo.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State player spits on Florida State logo) 2017/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blackman's first possession ends in sack
videos.description: Freshman QB James Blackman sacked by B.J. Hill on the first possession of the game for Florida State.

videos.headline: Blackman finds band on the pass
videos.description: James Blackman throws it away but finds the band on the sideline.

videos.headline: Blackman takes sack that leads to FG
videos.description: Bradley Chubb sacks James Blackman to force a field goal just before halftime.

videos.headline: Tate pulls in big gain from Blackman that leads to FG
videos.description: James Blackman throws a dime to Auden Tate but Tate comes out of the game with an arm injury.

videos.headline: Gallaspy 30-yard run sets up NC State FG
videos.description: Reggie Gallaspy II breaks off a 30-yard run to the goal line to set up a field goal for NC State.

videos.headline: FSU's Pugh ejected for targeting
videos.description: Florida State linebacker Jacob Pugh is ejected for targeting on his hit to North Carolina State's Gavin Locklear.

videos.headline: FSU gets safety to stay in the game
videos.description: NC State with a costly safety midway through the 4th quarter.

videos.headline: FSU blocks punt late in 4th leads to FG
videos.description: FSU stays alive with a blocked punt by Brian Burns.

videos.headline: Fischer discusses halftime deficit to NC State
videos.description: Jimbo Fischer still confident in freshman QB James Blackman despite being down at the half.

videos.headline: Doeren: "We expected to win"
videos.description: NC State head coach Dave Doeren is happy for his team as the Wolfpack defeat the Seminoles 27-21.

videos.headline: Chubb gets revenge from last year
videos.description: Bradley Chubb discusses avenging last years loss to Florida State.

videos.headline: NC State pressured Blackman to get win
videos.description: Jason Benetti and Anthony Becht break down upset victory for NC State over Florida State.

videos.headline: NC State stops FSU momentum with fumble recovery
videos.description: James Blackman makes a spin move, but fumbles and a mad scramble for the ball ends up in NC State's hands.
